content:
🌟 filebrowser | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Self-hosted web-based file management and administration.
✨ Key Features: • Web-based file management • User and access control • File sharing with customizable options • OIDC, LDAP, JWT, password + 2FA, and proxy login support • Responsive and customizable UI
📖 Summary: FileBrowser Quantum is a self-hosted, web-based file manager that offers advanced features for managing files, users, and access permissions. It aims to be a user-friendly and powerful alternative to existing solutions, with a focus on a streamlined configuration and an efficient user interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 neohtop | Svelte
🎯 Primary Use Case: Desktop system monitoring and process management
✨ Key Features: • Real-time process monitoring • CPU and Memory usage tracking • Modern UI with dark/light themes • Advanced process search and filtering • Pin important processes
📖 Summary: NeoHtop is a modern, cross-platform desktop system monitor built with Rust, Tauri, and Svelte. It provides real-time process monitoring, CPU and memory usage tracking, advanced search and filtering, and process management features in a visually appealing UI.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ LUKSbox | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securely storing and accessing sensitive files on untrusted or shared storage media, such as cloud services or external drives, with advanced cryptographic protection.
✨ Key Features: • Encrypted container creation for sensitive files • Support for passphrase, FIDO2, TPM 2.0/SEP, and hybrid post-quantum keys (ML-KEM) • Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows
📖 Summary: LUKSbox is a Rust-based tool for creating encrypted file containers (vaults) that can be securely stored on untrusted media like cloud storage or USB drives. It supports modern and post-quantum cryptographic keys, including FIDO2 hardware keys and TPM, and mounts as a virtual drive on major operating systems.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 TempFastMail | PHP
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a temporary, self-hosted email inbox for receiving and viewing emails without long-term storage, enhancing privacy and offering a disposable email solution.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted temporary email inbox • Receives and displays messages • Emails automatically deleted after 48 hours • Quick start with Docker Compose • Integration with Cloudflare Email Worker
📖 Summary: TempFastMail is a self-hosted, disposable email inbox solution built with PHP and React. It allows users to receive and display emails temporarily, with automatic deletion after 48 hours, ensuring privacy. It's designed for quick setup using Docker Compose and integration with services like Cloudflare Email Workers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 flutter-agent-panel | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enhancing AI pair-coding and developer workflow by unifying terminal emulation and AI agent management in a cross-platform desktop application.
✨ Key Features: • Multi-Workspace Management • Professional Terminal Emulator (xterm.dart, flutter_pty) • AI Agent Integration (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, etc.) • Modern UI/UX (shadcn_ui, dark/light mode)
📖 Summary: Flutter Agent Panel is a cross-platform desktop application that unifies a terminal emulator with AI agent management. It allows developers to organize their CLI tools and AI assistants within distinct workspaces, streamlining AI-powered pair-coding and command-line workflows.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
